subject: [PATCH v2 020/110] befs: use PRIino format for i_ino

reviews.author: Jeff Linux-f2fs-devel
reviews.summary: The reviewer noted that the patch does not actually change any of the format strings to use PRIino, and requested that the changes be made.

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch updates the befs file system to use the PRIino format for printing inode numbers. This is a preparation step for widening inode numbers via the kino_t type. The patch also corrects signed format specifiers to unsigned, as inode numbers are unsigned values. Additionally, it removes unnecessary casts on i_ino.
